title: MTR: Curved Platform
description: Add platform blocks as a MTR rail/track model, allowing smoother curved/sloped platform to be created.
body:
# Curved Platform Pack
This is resource pack for the [Minecraft Transit Railway Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) which adds NTE/MTR 4 Rail Model which replicates MTR's built-in platform block model.  
This allows for a visually curved/sloped platform depending on how the track is placed.

## Contents
This pack contains the following platform block track model, including a flipped/non-flipped variant:
- Hong Kong (Platform HK)
- With Platform Screen Doors (Platform PSD)
- With Automatic Platform Gates (Platform APG)
- North America Yellow (Platform NA1)
- North America Black (Platform NA2)
- United Kingdom (Platform UK)

To use, Shift+Right click a brush with a rail node (In MTR 3 + NTE), or simply right click a brush with a rail node in MTR 4 to choose the model.

## Notes & Compatibility
- If you are using MTR 3, this pack requires the [Nemo Transit Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mod and **v1.0.0** of this pack. If you are using MTR 4, you can load this pack directly in MTR 4 without additional dependencies/mods.
- Track models does not contain collision, you are advised to place barrier block/glasses underneath
- You can use look-alike glass color to fill out the hole between blocks.
- You can right click with a brush in MTR 3 + NTE to flip the platform
